evals.prompt: Extract black boxes from the Python file at lib/config.py. I need to understand what functions and classes are defined there.
evals.expected_output: YAML formatted black boxes with functions and classes extracted from the config file
expectations: Output includes extracted functions from the Python file
Output follows YAML format with black boxes structure

evals.prompt: Parse the README.md file and extract its sections as black boxes. Tell me what the main components are.
evals.expected_output: Sections extracted with headings, content, and structure
expectations: Output includes sections from the markdown file
Output follows the black box template format

evals.prompt: Extract the structure from tests/fixtures/sample.pdf - I want to see what sections it contains.
evals.expected_output: PDF sections with titles and content
expectations: Output includes sections from the PDF
